Skip to contents
centrcanon 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • The CEnTR*MAP Analytical Pipeline

Package index

Pipeline 1 — Anchoring

Identify which concepts are most central to how a community talks about CEnR via correspondence analysis and PAM clustering.

prepare_contingency_table()
Prepare a contingency table from an edgelist
run_correspondence_analysis()
Run correspondence analysis on a contingency table
run_pam_clustering()
Run PAM clustering on CA column coordinates
calculate_anchoring_score()
Calculate conceptual anchoring scores

Pipeline 2 — Integration

Identify structural connectors across the concept network using a suite of centrality measures.

create_network()
Create an undirected network graph from an edgelist
calculate_network_metrics()
Calculate network centrality metrics
calculate_integration_score()
Calculate integration scores from network metrics

Pipeline 3 — Leverage

Identify influential concepts and classify each node into one of eleven leverage roles.

calculate_leverage_score()
Calculate leverage scores and classify node roles

Utilities

Shared normalization and ranking helpers.

minmax_scale()
Min-max scale a numeric vector
dense_rank_normalize()
Dense-rank normalize a numeric vector
calculate_entropy()
Normalized Shannon entropy
calculate_tier()
Classify scores into performance tiers

Color palettes

centr_earthtone_palette()
Earthtone color palette for CEnTR*MAP
centr_layer_palette()
Three-layer color palette for CEnTR*MAP analytical pipelines

On this page
